nodes.name: Send Enrollment Email

parameters.jsonBody:
={
  "from": "david@aiandwebservices.com",
  "to": "{{ $json.customer_email }}",
  "reply_to": "aiandwebservices@gmail.com",
  "subject": "Your {{ $json.name }} setup is complete — enroll in your monthly subscription",
  "html": {{ JSON.stringify($json.email_html ?? '') }},
  "text": "Hi {{ $json.customer_name }},

Your {{ $json.name }} setup payment of ${{ $json.setup_amount }} has been received.

Complete your enrollment here:
{{ $json.monthlyLink }}

What happens next:
1. Click the link above and enroll in your ${{ $json.monthlyAmount }}/month subscription.
2. David reviews your business and begins onboarding within 1 business day.
3. You'll receive a calendar invite for your kickoff call within 24 hours.

Questions? Email david@aiandwebservices.com

— David Pulis, AIandWEBservices"
}

nodes.notes: Uses Resend API Header Auth credential. The HTML body is built in the preceding Code node (Build Email HTML). If customer_name is unavailable, falls back to email address.

parameters.jsCode:
// Inject template variables into the HTML email // In production, ideally load this from an external template store. // For now, inline with n8n expressions replaced. const item = $input.first().json; const firstName = item.customer_name?.split(' ')[0] ?? 'there'; const tierName = item.name ?? 'your plan'; const monthlyAmount = String(item.monthlyAmount ?? ''); const monthlyLink = item.monthlyLink ?? '#'; const setupAmount = String(item.setup_amount ?? ''); // Minimal transactional HTML — references template vars const html = ` Your ${tierName} setup is complete
AIandWEBservices
AI Automation & Web Services
✓  Setup Payment Received

Hi ${firstName},

Your ${tierName} setup payment of $${setupAmount} has been received — thank you for choosing AIandWEBservices.

The next step is to enroll in your monthly subscription so David can begin the onboarding process. It takes less than 2 minutes.

Enroll in ${tierName} Monthly — $${monthlyAmount}/mo →

No lock-in — cancel or pause anytime

What happens next

1.  Click the button above and complete your $${monthlyAmount}/month enrollment.

2.  David reviews your business and begins onboarding within 1 business day.

3.  You'll receive a calendar invite for your kickoff call within 24 hours.

Questions? Reach David directly.

Reply to this email or write to david@aiandwebservices.com — guaranteed response within 6 hours.

David Pulis — AIandWEBservices

david@aiandwebservices.com • Miami, FL • aiandwebservices.com

You received this transactional email because you purchased a service from AIandWEBservices.
AIandWEBservices • Miami, FL • USA

`; return [{ json: { ...item, email_html: html } }];

parameters.jsCode:
// Inject template variables into the HTML email // In production, ideally load this from an external template store. // For now, inline with n8n expressions replaced. const item = $input.first().json; const firstName = item.customer_name?.split(' ')[0] ?? 'there'; const tierName = item.name ?? 'your plan'; const monthlyAmount = String(item.monthlyAmount ?? ''); const monthlyLink = item.monthlyLink ?? '#'; const setupAmount = String(item.setup_amount ?? ''); // Minimal transactional HTML — references template vars const html = ` Your ${tierName} setup is complete
AIandWEBservices
AI Automation & Web Services
✓  Setup Payment Received

Hi ${firstName},

Your ${tierName} setup payment of $${setupAmount} has been received — thank you for choosing AIandWEBservices.

The next step is to enroll in your monthly subscription so David can begin the onboarding process. It takes less than 2 minutes.

Enroll in ${tierName} Monthly — $${monthlyAmount}/mo →

No lock-in — cancel or pause anytime

What happens next

1.  Click the button above and complete your $${monthlyAmount}/month enrollment.

2.  David reviews your business and begins onboarding within 1 business day.

3.  You'll receive a calendar invite for your kickoff call within 24 hours.

Questions? Reach David directly.

Reply to this email or write to david@aiandwebservices.com — guaranteed response within 6 hours.

David Pulis — AIandWEBservices

david@aiandwebservices.com • Miami, FL • aiandwebservices.com

You received this transactional email because you purchased a service from AIandWEBservices.
AIandWEBservices • Miami, FL • USA

`; return [{ json: { ...item, email_html: html } }];
